If there is no FC => automatic ignore, unless you think gossiping, which may turn something into rumor, can help you reach YOUR GOALS!

If FC is done or appropriate, please refer them to professionals ( e.g. counselors and lawyers specializing in those areas). IMHO, it is beyond our ability to help on similar cases.

Please consider STOP "discussing" similar cases since there is NO practical or constructive value helping victims, if they are real. I don't think they like to be "gossiped" either!!

Do you have more productive things and important goals to work on today and this week !?!?

Do you want to see >2 millions showing up on 11/2 peaceful assembly?

The media fight is so intense on USA ( our Act : Bill H.R. 3289 / S 1838), can you help send a note to senators (list - http://tiny.cc/nvf9ez) and express urgency and severity of situations?

We don't have $ like CCP, but we have HANDS! CCP/HK official worked very hard to create impressions on all media and lobby the senators since they cannot afford to lose and would hate moving the Act to the floor for discussion or even pass it!

When is your last time to read a book on this movement related topics or strategies..?

Life is a matter of balance. Maybe you are too focused on this movement. Would you like to spend some quality time with your family members--- it's great doing it NOW( yes, nowwwww) since nobody knows about "the" future !
